title: Haski totem
description: Haski totem with sound is a simple resource pack that replaces the texture of the totem and its sound with the meme with Haski!
body:
Haski totem with sound is a simple resource pack that replaces the texture of the totem and its sound with the meme with Haski!

This resource pack was made for the players of the GribMine server! Join us
